testcase.name: test_removed_route_planning_reinitialiser
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_rbac_complete_validation.py:79: in test_removed_route_planning_reinitialiser assert response.status_code == 404, f"Expected 404, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 404, got 405 E assert 405 == 404 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 401 assert 401 in [200, 400, 422, 500] + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
